use.flag: Enable build of the dec265 example decoder program
Enable build of the enc265 example encoder program; live ebuild only, upstream strips this directory from release tarballs
Enable video output of dec265 via media-libs/libsdl2
Install upstream-internal development tools (bjoentegaard, block-rate-estim, gen-enc-table, rd-curves, tests, yuv-distortion); live ebuild only, not intended for end users
